name: getGPSTimeString
title: getGPSTimeString
description: Copies a printed representation of the GPS time stamp represented as UTC date and time into the supplied character buffer. The format of the string is ddd mmm dd hh:mm:ss jjjj (e.g. "Fri Aug 21 15:22:24 1998").

parameters.name: timeBuffer
parameters.description: The buffer the string will be written in.This buffer must be at least 26 characters long.
